title: General Dynamics stock target raised at JPMorgan but should you buy it?
text: General Dynamics Corporation (NYSE:GD) was assigned an overweight rating at JPMorgan with a price target of $260. This was after its earnings per share of $2.61 in the first quarter, surpassing estimates of $2.50 and the previous $2.48.

title: General Dynamics Corporation (GD) CEO Phebe Novakovic on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: General Dynamics Corporation (NYSE:GD ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call April 27, 2022 9:00 AM ET Company Participants Howard Rubel - Vice President, Investor Relations Phebe Novakovic - Chairman and Chief Executive Officer Jason Aiken - Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Mariana Perez Mora - Bank of America Myles Walton - UBS David Strauss - Barclays Seth Seifman - JPMorgan Robert Stallard - Vertical Research Robert Spingarn - Melius Research Doug Harned - Bernstein Sheila Kahyaoglu - Jefferies Michael Maugeri - Wolfe Research Peter Arment - Baird Cai von Rumohr - Cowen Matthew Akers - Wells Fargo Kristine Liwag - Morgan Stanley George Shapiro - Shapiro Research Operator Hello, and welcome to the General Dynamics First Quarter 2022 Conference Call. My name is Alex, and I'll be coordinating the call today.

title: General Dynamics (GD) Q1 Earnings Top, Revenues Flat Y/Y
text: General Dynamics' (GD) first-quarter earnings beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 4.8%. Revenues remain almost flat when compared with the year-ago quarter.

title: General Dynamics (GD) Beats Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: General Dynamics (GD) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 4.82% and 4.62%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: General Dynamics profit rises 3% on strong demand for private jets
text: Gulfstream jet maker General Dynamics Corp on Wednesday posted a 3.1% rise in first-quarter profit, as demand for private air travel during the COVID-19 pandemic remained high.

title: Aerospace & Defense Q1 Earnings Due on Apr 27: BA, GD & TDY
text: Aerospace sector Q1 earnings are expected to improve 10.8% from the prior-year quarter's reported figure, while revenues are projected to slip by 0.4%.

title: Earnings Previews: Boeing, General Dynamics, Teck Resources

title: General Dynamics: A Safe Long-Play For Inflation And Geopolitics
text: The rising geopolitical tensions around the globe translate to a momentum in defense stocks. Aerospace & Defense stocks are cyclical, benefiting from both scenarios, geopolitical issues and/or steadily declining inflation.

title: Will Segment Sales Hurt General Dynamics' (GD) Q1 Earnings?
text: General Dynamics' (GD) Q1 results are likely to reflect dismal performance across most of its business segments. Also, increased expenses might have hurt earnings.

title: General Dynamics (GD) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
text: General Dynamics (GD) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: 5 Top S&P 500 Stocks to Tap Q1 Earnings Growth

title: General Dynamics Shipyard Boss Leaves As Workers Get Up To 39% Pay Boost
text: In a sign of inflationary pressure, a key Navy shipbuilder boosts worker pay, losing a well-regarded shipyard boss in the process.

title: General Dynamics (GD) Wins Deal for Virginia Class Submarine
text: General Dynamics (GD) is set to perform planning and execution efforts for supporting the Virginia Class Submarine Program.

title: Why the Earnings Surprise Streak Could Continue for General Dynamics (GD)
text: General Dynamics (GD) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: General Dynamics to Webcast 2022 First-Quarter Financial Results Conference Call
text: RESTON, Va. , April 8, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- General Dynamics (NYSE: GD) will webcast its first-quarter 2022 financial results conference call on Wednesday, April 27, 2022, beginning at 9 a.m.

title: U.S. FY23 DoD Budget Proposal Seeks 4.1% Hike: Stocks to Gain
